name: BANK OF AMERICA CORP /DE/
summary: Bank of America Corporation is a Delaware-incorporated financial institution headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina. This filing pertains to the Fifth Amendment of the Bank of America Deferred Compensation Plan (formerly the Bank of America 401(k) Restoration Plan), a benefit plan sponsored by the company for eligible employees and affiliated company employees, modifying beneficiary designation rules and claims adjudication jurisdiction effective January 1, 2025.
